stories.title: Pelicans hiring Mosley as head coach, sources say
stories.summary: The Pelicans have hired Jamahl Mosley as their new head coach. He spent the past five seasons in Orlando, going 189-221 and earning three playoff berths.

stories.title: Rory fires back at fan after 'USA' shout from gall...
stories.summary: Rory McIlroy's frustrating final round at the PGA Championship on Sunday boiled over with an angry exchange with a fan after a "U-S-A!" shout from the gallery at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: Report: Meyer loses grievance, saving Jags $30M
stories.summary: Former Jaguars head coach Urban Meyer has lost his grievance against the team regarding receiving the balance of the remainder of his contract after his 2021 firing, according to On3.com.
